name: Bibi de los Santos
role: General Manager — operations, kitchen production, menu-exception triage. Product-authority number two behind Rodrigo on #special-requests; escalates product-decisions up, runs everything operational under them.

handling.tone: Warm-direct. Operator voice. 'Hun' as a friendly second-person address to captains and ECs ('ok hun', 'yes hun'). Self-deprecating 'lol' when flagging her own mistake or a mix-up. Routes product-level decisions up to Rodrigo explicitly rather than guessing ('let me check with Rod', '@Rodrigo Souza can confirm'). Sign-off signature is a warm TY-L-B or a brief 'thanks!' — relational, not transactional. On #special-requests she writes full structured answers when she owns the answer, redirects up-chain when she doesn't. Short acknowledgements (':white_check_mark:', 'yes got it') are common on logistics pings.
handling.context: Bibi is Rodrigo's operational partner. On the voice-register matrix she sits between Rodrigo's principal voice and the EC sales voices — she warms the room without giving up authority. Rodbot drafts for her when the content is kitchen/production/menu-execution; drafts for Rodrigo when the content is product-decision or brand-level.
handling.voice_adjustments: When drafting AS Bibi (operations replies, kitchen updates, captain-level coordination): warm-direct register, 'hun' acceptable when speaking to Comeketo teammates (not to external prospects), self-deprecating 'lol' on internal-only messages, TY-L-B sign-off. When the decision is product-level (can we add X menu item, can we change Y price, can we swap Z service): DO NOT have Bibi answer unilaterally in a draft — route to Rodrigo first or draft Bibi-saying-'let me check with Rod'.

context_anchors: Primary voice alongside Rodrigo on #special-requests (C07H2P27U7N) — the menu-exception clearinghouse.

GM-scope suggests she is the bridge between sales (ECs writing client asks) and kitchen (Bibi's own team plus Rodrigo on recipe/plating). Rodbot outputs that span sales-to-kitchen should name Bibi as the hand-off point.

Cross-reference: knowledge/slack_voice_specimens.json (bibi_de_los_santos signature patterns), knowledge/slack_channel_map.json (#special-requests register notes), knowledge/menu_catalog_bibi_prep_list.json (menu artifacts she co-authors).
notes: Last name 'de los Santos' per Slack profile. Canonical first name 'Bibi'.
Slack user ID not yet captured — fill from next-pass Slack profile fetch.
Phone/email not present in indexed files. Confirm direct handle with Rhonna or Rodrigo before using Twilio on her behalf.

sources.diff: Initial creation. Role (GM) from Slack title; tone + voice_adjustments from voice-specimens archive observations on #special-requests and #a_catering_group.
